findings.description: 716MB stuck on both GPUs after del and empty_cache — identical residual
NVML reports 0pct memory utilization while 716MB remains
Power stays at 235-239W after clear — never returns to 190W baseline
B200 residual 716MB — nearly double A100 and H200 382MB

conclusion: B200 VRAM residual 716MB confirmed on 2x GPU. Power never drops. NVML blind. Security risk confirmed.
